title: Department Manager Vacancy at GAP India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at GAP India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with GAP India! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Aurangabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About GAP India:
GAP India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GAP India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
